summary: Converted the stage ground library object from standalone assembly to C by deleting asm/melee/gr/grlib.s, adding src/melee/gr/grlib.c and grlib.h, and switching obj_files.mk to build the C object. The new C covers grlib particle/effect helpers, JObj effect cleanup traversal, stage animation object creation, stage animation state accessors, and stage-dependent vector logic, while leaving func_801C9EE8 as inline asm inside grlib.c. Supporting type/prototype work added StageAnim in stage.h, JObj translation inline accessors and HSD_JObjReqAnimAll in jobj.h, and corrected/added prototypes for HSD_ForeachAnim, HSD_JObjAnimAll, func_8001044C, func_8002A278, and func_801C0498.
what_changed: Removed the 786-line assembly file asm/melee/gr/grlib.s and replaced the build target in obj_files.mk with src/melee/gr/grlib.c.o.
Added src/melee/gr/grlib.c with C implementations for func_801C96E8 through func_801C9E60 and an inline asm body for func_801C9EE8.

Added particle/generator helper structs in grlib.c, including UnkGeneratorMember, UnkGeneratorStruct, UnkEffectStruct, and UnkAnimStruct, to express known offsets such as x54, xA2, x10_jobj, and x16_flags.
Added grlib.h declarations for grlib entry points including func_801C96F8, func_801C98A0, func_801C9908, func_801C9CEC, func_801C9E40, func_801C9E50, func_801C9E60, and func_801C9EE8.
Recovered StageAnim in stage.h with joint and anims fields and changed StageInfo.x6CC from void* to StageAnim*.
Added HSD_JObjReqAnimAll and inline HSD_JObjGetTranslationX/Y accessors to jobj.h, with assert_line calls matching baselib assert behavior.
Changed HSD_ForeachAnim from an untyped asm void(void) declaration to asm void HSD_ForeachAnim(void*, ...) and removed a duplicate extern from ground.c.
Updated include/functions.h prototypes for func_8001044C, func_8002A278, func_801C0498, HSD_ForeachAnim, and HSD_JObjAnimAll.
smart_moves: Used narrow local structs with explicit padding/fill fields to recover only the offsets needed for matching instead of prematurely naming full particle or generator layouts.
Introduced StageAnim and typed StageInfo.x6CC so func_801C9CEC could naturally express joint loading and animation indexing.
Kept func_801C9EE8 as inline asm in the C file, allowing the object to move from asm to C while preserving a hard-to-match routine.
Added inline jobj_child and jobj_next helpers for null-safe child/next traversal in func_801C9908, matching the assembly pattern that guarded against NULL before field loads.
Used assert_line in func_801C9A70 and the JObj translation accessors to reproduce assertion callsites and line-number-sensitive codegen.
Made HSD_ForeachAnim variadic so the grlib call with flags callback arguments could be represented without overfitting the full baselib API.
decomp_lessons: For partial decompilation of an object, moving the whole object to C can still be viable if remaining difficult functions are embedded as inline asm.
Stage globals often need small structural recovery before nearby code will become readable and matchable; here StageInfo.x6CC became a StageAnim pointer with joint and anims fields.
Baselib convenience accessors can be necessary for matching because they encode assertions and line numbers, not just simple field reads.
When a function walks intrusive linked lists and may delete/free the current node, preserve the next pointer before the deletion call; grlib does this for lbl_804D78FC effect cleanup.
Use exact flag constants from the assembly when names are not yet known, such as x16_flags |= 0x80, jobj->flags & 0x1000, and aobj->flags & 0x40000000.
Wrapper functions around unknown engine calls can often be matched with typed prototypes first, even before the callee names are understood.
naming_conventions: Unknown recovered structs were named with _Unk*Struct or _Unk*Member prefixes and offset-style fields such as x54, xA2, x10_jobj, and x16_flags.
Static callback labels retained address-label names lbl_801C9BC8 and lbl_801C9C40 because semantic names were not established in the evidence.
Internal stage enum values in grlib.c used short uppercase stage identifiers RCRUISE, BIGBLUE, and ICEMTN with comments giving human-readable names.
The added grlib.h header guard is _grtlib_h_, which appears to preserve the submitted file text but looks like a typo relative to grlib; no review comment in this slice explains it.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Replaced sdata2 constants 0.0f and 0.5f with C floating literals in grlib.c where possible.
Used direct struct assignment for S32Vec and Vec copies to reproduce three consecutive word loads/stores.
Used explicit if/else mapping from idx1 values 1..4 to idx0 values 0..3 in func_801C9CEC rather than a more abstract expression, matching the original branch structure.
Used a switch with assert_line(290, 0) in func_801C9A70 to match the default assertion path for invalid vector index values.
Added variadic HSD_ForeachAnim prototype and precise HSD_JObjAnimAll signature to make callsites type-check and match.
Preserved inline asm for func_801C9EE8, including loops over fighter/item lists and collision-box comparisons, rather than forcing an unmatured C translation.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or reviews were present in this PR slice.
Because there is no human text excerpt, reviewer intent and any requested fixes cannot be inferred from this evidence.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename grlib functions func_801C96F8 through func_801C9EE8.
Find later PRs that replace inline asm func_801C9EE8 with C.
Search for corrections or uses of the grlib.h header guard _grtlib_h_.
Search for later struct refinements of UnkEffectStruct, UnkGeneratorStruct, and StageAnim.
Search for later type improvements to HSD_ForeachAnim and HSD_JObjAnimAll.
